default_action: open human wait and stop automated retries
pause host route, request human handling, and classify unresolved items

examples: script attempts to process all library files
default_action: fail fast, stop execution, and require reviewer gate

examples: same no-DOI article appears twice with title formatting differences
same PDF hash covers two selected rows
default_action: document row coverage and unique-paper coverage separately

examples: task message drafted but not delivered
no verifiable reply from librarian or reviewer
default_action: mark dispatch_prepared or dispatch_unverified; do not claim contact

examples: no status update for more than 300 seconds
process not found while task marked running
default_action: pause, inspect process and status files, then report true state
record platform status and route to alternate DB or manual pending list

examples: whole-library sync attempted for scoped batch
default_action: stop and rerun only with scoped DB-only sync evidence
